 1using System;
 2using System.Collections.Generic;
 3using System.Linq;
 4using UnityEditor;

 11namespace ODDGames.UITest.VisualBuilder.Editor
 12{
 13    /// <summary>
 14    /// Visual Test Builder with Scratch-style blocks.
 15    /// Flow: Select scene → Enter play mode → Add/edit blocks → Save each block → Run
 16    /// </summary>
 17    public class TestBuilder : EditorWindow
 18    {
 19        // Session state keys for domain reload persistence
 20        private const string kSessionTestPath = "TestBuilder.SessionTestPath";
 21        private const string kSessionSelectedBlock = "TestBuilder.SessionSelectedBlock";
 22        private const string kSessionEditingBlock = "TestBuilder.SessionEditingBlock";
 23
 24        private VisualTest currentTest;
 25        private int selectedBlockIndex = -1;
 26
 27        // UI Elements
 28        private VisualElement root;
 29        private VisualElement blockPanel;
 30        private VisualElement blockListContainer;
 31        private TextField testNameField;
 32        private DropdownField sceneDropdown;
 33        private Label statusLabel;
 34        private Button startEditBtn;
 35        private Button stopBtn;
 36        private Button playTestBtn;
 37        private VisualElement blockControls;
 38        private VisualElement blockControlsRow2;
 39
 40        // Block editing state
 41        private int editingBlockIndex = -1;  // Which block is currently being edited (-1 = none)
 42        private bool blockHasUnsavedChanges;
 43
 44        // Visual picking state
 45        private bool isPickingTarget;
 46        private bool isPickingDragTarget;
 47        private int pickingBlockIndex = -1;
 48        private ElementInfo hoveredElement;
 49
 50        // State
 51        private AIAssistant aiAssistant;
 52        private List<ElementInfo> currentElements = new();
 53
 54        // AI status panel
 55        private VisualElement aiStatusPanel;
 56        private Label aiStateLabel;
 57        private Label aiReasoningLabel;
 58        private ProgressBar aiProgressBar;
 59        private Button aiStopButton;
 60        private int aiActionCount;

 62
 63        [MenuItem("Window/Analysis/UI Automation/Test Builder")]
 64        public static TestBuilder ShowWindow()
 65        {
 66            var window = GetWindow<TestBuilder>();
 67            window.titleContent = new GUIContent("Test Builder", EditorGUIUtility.IconContent("TestPassed").image);
 68            window.minSize = new Vector2(350, 400);
 69            return window;
 70        }
 71
 72        private void OnEnable()
 73        {
 74            Undo.undoRedoPerformed += OnUndoRedo;
 75            EditorApplication.playModeStateChanged += OnPlayModeChanged;
 76            SceneView.duringSceneGui += OnSceneGUI;
 77
 78            // Restore state from session if we're recovering from domain reload
 79            RestoreSessionState();
 80        }
 81
 82        private void OnDisable()
 83        {
 84            Undo.undoRedoPerformed -= OnUndoRedo;
 85            EditorApplication.playModeStateChanged -= OnPlayModeChanged;
 86            SceneView.duringSceneGui -= OnSceneGUI;
 87            aiAssistant?.Dispose();
 88            CancelPicking();
 89
 90            // Save state to session for domain reload recovery
 91            SaveSessionState();
 92        }
 93
 94        private void SaveSessionState()
 95        {
 96            // Save current test path
 97            var testPath = currentTest != null ? AssetDatabase.GetAssetPath(currentTest) : "";
 98            SessionState.SetString(kSessionTestPath, testPath);
 99            SessionState.SetInt(kSessionSelectedBlock, selectedBlockIndex);
 100            SessionState.SetInt(kSessionEditingBlock, editingBlockIndex);
 101        }
 102
 103        private void RestoreSessionState()
 104        {
 105            // Only restore if we don't already have a test loaded
 106            if (currentTest != null) return;
 107
 108            var testPath = SessionState.GetString(kSessionTestPath, "");
 109            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(testPath))
 110            {
 111                var test = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTest>(testPath);
 112                if (test != null)
 113                {
 114                    currentTest = test;
 115                    selectedBlockIndex = SessionState.GetInt(kSessionSelectedBlock, -1);
 116                    editingBlockIndex = SessionState.GetInt(kSessionEditingBlock, -1);
 117
 118                    // Clear editing state after domain reload - unsaved changes are lost
 119                    blockHasUnsavedChanges = false;
 120                }
 121            }
 122        }
 123
 124        private void CancelPicking()
 125        {
 126            isPickingTarget = false;
 127            isPickingDragTarget = false;
 128            pickingBlockIndex = -1;
 129            hoveredElement = null;
 130        }
 131
 132        private void OnUndoRedo()
 133        {
 134            if (currentTest != null)
 135            {
 136                if (selectedBlockIndex >= currentTest.blocks.Count)
 137                    selectedBlockIndex = currentTest.blocks.Count - 1;
 138                RefreshBlockList();
 139            }
 140        }
 141
 142        private void OnPlayModeChanged(PlayModeStateChange state)
 143        {
 144            if (state == PlayModeStateChange.EnteredPlayMode)
 145            {
 146                // Restore session state after domain reload
 147                RestoreSessionState();
 148
 149                // Update UI fields to reflect restored state
 150                if (currentTest != null)
 151                {
 152                    testNameField?.SetValueWithoutNotify(currentTest.testName ?? "");
 153                    var sceneName = string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentTest.startScene) ? "-- Select Scene --" : currentTest.st
 154                    sceneDropdown?.SetValueWithoutNotify(sceneName);
 155                }
 156
 157                RefreshUI();
 158            }
 159            else if (state == PlayModeStateChange.ExitingPlayMode)
 160            {
 161                // Save state before domain reload
 162                SaveSessionState();
 163
 164                aiAssistant?.Stop();
 165                editingBlockIndex = -1;
 166                blockHasUnsavedChanges = false;
 167                RefreshUI();
 168            }
 169        }
 170
 171        private void CreateGUI()
 172        {
 173            root = rootVisualElement;
 174            root.style.flexGrow = 1;
 175            root.style.flexDirection = FlexDirection.Column;
 176            root.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.18f, 0.18f, 0.18f);
 177
 178            BuildToolbar();
 179            BuildMainContent();
 180            BuildStatusBar();
 181
 182            // If test was already restored in OnEnable, sync UI fields
 183            // Otherwise load from EditorPrefs
 184            if (currentTest != null)
 185            {
 186                testNameField?.SetValueWithoutNotify(currentTest.testName ?? "");
 187                var sceneName = string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentTest.startScene) ? "-- Select Scene --" : currentTest.startS
 188                sceneDropdown?.SetValueWithoutNotify(sceneName);
 189            }
 190            else
 191            {
 192                LoadLastTest();
 193            }
 194            RefreshUI();
 195        }
 196
 197        private void BuildToolbar()
 198        {
 199            var toolbar = new Toolbar();
 200
 201            // File menu
 202            var fileMenu = new ToolbarMenu { text = "File" };
 203            fileMenu.menu.AppendAction("New Test", _ => OnNewTest());
 204            fileMenu.menu.AppendAction("Save Test", _ => OnSaveTest());
 205            fileMenu.menu.AppendAction("Load...", _ => OnLoadTest());
 206            toolbar.Add(fileMenu);
 207
 208            // Test name
 209            testNameField = new TextField { style = { width = 120, marginLeft = 4 } };
 210            testNameField.RegisterValueChangedCallback(evt =>
 211            {
 212                if (currentTest != null)
 213                {
 214                    Undo.RecordObject(currentTest, "Rename test");
 215                    currentTest.testName = evt.newValue;
 216                    EditorUtility.SetDirty(currentTest);
 217                }
 218            });
 219            toolbar.Add(testNameField);
 220
 221            // Scene selector
 222            var sceneNames = GetAllSceneNames();
 223            sceneDropdown = new DropdownField(sceneNames, 0) { style = { width = 120, marginLeft = 4 } };
 224            sceneDropdown.RegisterValueChangedCallback(OnSceneSelected);
 225            toolbar.Add(sceneDropdown);
 226
 227            toolbar.Add(new ToolbarSpacer { flex = true });
 228
 229            // Play test button (runs entire test from start)
 230            playTestBtn = new Button(OnPlayTest) { text = "▶ Play" };
 231            playTestBtn.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.2f, 0.5f, 0.2f);
 232            playTestBtn.tooltip = "Run entire test from start";
 233            toolbar.Add(playTestBtn);
 234
 235            // Start/Stop buttons
 236            startEditBtn = new Button(OnStartEdit) { text = "Edit" };
 237            startEditBtn.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.3f, 0.5f, 0.3f);
 238            startEditBtn.tooltip = "Enter play mode to edit blocks";
 239            toolbar.Add(startEditBtn);
 240
 241            stopBtn = new Button(OnStopEdit) { text = "■" };
 242            stopBtn.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.5f, 0.3f, 0.3f);
 243            stopBtn.tooltip = "Stop and exit play mode";
 244            toolbar.Add(stopBtn);
 245
 246            root.Add(toolbar);
 247        }
 248
 249        private void OnSceneSelected(ChangeEvent<string> evt)
 250        {
 251            if (currentTest == null) return;
 252
 253            var sceneName = evt.newValue == "-- Select Scene --" ? "" : evt.newValue;
 254            Undo.RecordObject(currentTest, "Change scene");
 255            currentTest.startScene = sceneName;
 256            EditorUtility.SetDirty(currentTest);
 257            RefreshUI();
 258        }
 259
 260        private void OnStartEdit()
 261        {
 262            if (currentTest == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentTest.startScene))
 263            {
 264                statusLabel.text = "Select a scene first";
 265                return;
 266            }
 267
 268            // Load the scene
 269            var scenePath = GetScenePath(currentTest.startScene);
 270            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(scenePath))
 271            {
 272                statusLabel.text = $"Scene not found: {currentTest.startScene}";
 273                return;
 274            }
 275
 276            // Save test first
 277            OnSaveTest();
 278
 279            // Open scene and enter play mode
 280            UnityEditor.SceneManagement.EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
 281            EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
 282            statusLabel.text = "Entering play mode...";
 283        }
 284
 285        private void OnStopEdit()
 286        {
 287            if (EditorApplication.isPlaying)
 288            {
 289                EditorApplication.isPlaying = false;
 290            }
 291            editingBlockIndex = -1;
 292            blockHasUnsavedChanges = false;
 293            RefreshUI();
 294        }
 295
 296        private async void OnPlayTest()
 297        {
 298            if (currentTest == null || currentTest.blocks.Count == 0)
 299            {
 300                statusLabel.text = "No blocks to run";
 301                return;
 302            }
 303
 304            if (!EditorApplication.isPlaying)
 305            {
 306                // Need to enter play mode first
 307                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentTest.startScene))
 308                {
 309                    statusLabel.text = "Select a scene first";
 310                    return;
 311                }
 312
 313                var scenePath = GetScenePath(currentTest.startScene);
 314                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(scenePath))
 315                {
 316                    statusLabel.text = $"Scene not found: {currentTest.startScene}";
 317                    return;
 318                }
 319
 320                OnSaveTest();
 321                UnityEditor.SceneManagement.EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
 322                EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
 323
 324                // Wait for play mode
 325                while (!EditorApplication.isPlaying)
 326                    await UniTask.Yield();
 327                await UniTask.DelayFrame(5);
 328            }
 329            else
 330            {
 331                // Already in play mode - restart scene
 332                await RestartScene();
 333            }
 334
 335            // Run all blocks
 336            statusLabel.text = $"Running test ({currentTest.blocks.Count} blocks)...";
 337
 338            for (int i = 0; i < currentTest.blocks.Count; i++)
 339            {
 340                if (!EditorApplication.isPlaying) break;
 341
 342                selectedBlockIndex = i;
 343                RefreshBlockList();
 344                statusLabel.text = $"Running block {i + 1}/{currentTest.blocks.Count}...";
 345
 346                await ExecuteBlock(currentTest.blocks[i]);
 347                await UniTask.Delay(200);
 348            }
 349
 350            if (EditorApplication.isPlaying)
 351                statusLabel.text = $"Test completed ({currentTest.blocks.Count} blocks)";
 352        }
 353
 354        private void BuildMainContent()
 355        {
 356            blockPanel = new VisualElement();
 357            blockPanel.style.flexGrow = 1;
 358            blockPanel.style.flexDirection = FlexDirection.Column;
 359
 360            // Row 1: Mouse/Touch Actions (Blue/Orange theme)
 361            blockControls = new VisualElement();
 362            blockControls.style.flexDirection = FlexDirection.Row;
 363            blockControls.style.flexWrap = Wrap.Wrap;
 364            blockControls.style.paddingLeft = 4;
 365            blockControls.style.paddingTop = 2;
 366            blockControls.style.paddingBottom = 1;
 367            blockControls.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.15f, 0.15f, 0.15f);
 368

 391            AddBlockTypeButton(blockControlsRow2, "Key", BlockType.KeyPress, new Color(0.63f, 0.5f, 1f), "Press keyboard

 434            // AI button
 435            var aiBtn = new Button(ShowAIPromptPopup) { text = "AI" };
 436            aiBtn.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.4f, 0.3f, 0.7f);
 437            aiBtn.style.color = Color.white;
 438            aiBtn.style.height = 18;
 439            aiBtn.style.fontSize = 10;
 440            aiBtn.style.paddingLeft = 6;
 441            aiBtn.style.paddingRight = 6;
 442            aiBtn.style.borderTopLeftRadius = 3;
 443            aiBtn.style.borderTopRightRadius = 3;
 444            aiBtn.style.borderBottomLeftRadius = 3;
 445            aiBtn.style.borderBottomRightRadius = 3;
 446            aiBtn.tooltip = "AI-assisted test creation";
 447            blockControlsRow4.Add(aiBtn);
 448
 449            // Settings button (gear icon)
 450            var settingsBtn = new Button(OpenAISettings) { text = "⚙" };
 451            settingsBtn.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.35f, 0.35f, 0.35f);
 452            settingsBtn.style.color = Color.white;
 453            settingsBtn.style.height = 18;
 454            settingsBtn.style.fontSize = 12;
 455            settingsBtn.style.marginLeft = 2;
 456            settingsBtn.style.paddingLeft = 4;
 457            settingsBtn.style.paddingRight = 4;
 458            settingsBtn.style.borderTopLeftRadius = 3;
 459            settingsBtn.style.borderTopRightRadius = 3;
 460            settingsBtn.style.borderBottomLeftRadius = 3;
 461            settingsBtn.style.borderBottomRightRadius = 3;
 462            settingsBtn.tooltip = "AI Settings";
 463            blockControlsRow4.Add(settingsBtn);
 464
 465            // Clear All button
 466            var clearAllBtn = new Button(OnClearAllBlocks) { text = "Clear All" };
 467            clearAllBtn.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.5f, 0.25f, 0.25f);
 468            clearAllBtn.style.color = Color.white;
 469            clearAllBtn.style.height = 18;
 470            clearAllBtn.style.fontSize = 10;
 471            clearAllBtn.style.marginLeft = 8;
 472            clearAllBtn.style.paddingLeft = 6;
 473            clearAllBtn.style.paddingRight = 6;
 474            clearAllBtn.style.borderTopLeftRadius = 3;
 475            clearAllBtn.style.borderTopRightRadius = 3;
 476            clearAllBtn.style.borderBottomLeftRadius = 3;
 477            clearAllBtn.style.borderBottomRightRadius = 3;
 478            clearAllBtn.tooltip = "Delete all blocks";
 479            blockControlsRow4.Add(clearAllBtn);
 480
 481            blockPanel.Add(blockControlsRow4);
 482
 483            // Block list
 484            var scroll = new ScrollView(ScrollViewMode.Vertical);
 485            scroll.style.flexGrow = 1;
 486            blockListContainer = new VisualElement();
 487            scroll.Add(blockListContainer);
 488            blockPanel.Add(scroll);
 489
 490            root.Add(blockPanel);
 491        }
 492
 493        private void OnClearAllBlocks()
 494        {
 495            if (currentTest == null || currentTest.blocks == null || currentTest.blocks.Count == 0)
 496            {
 497                statusLabel.text = "No blocks to clear";
 498                return;
 499            }
 500
 501            if (!EditorUtility.DisplayDialog("Clear All Blocks",
 502                $"Delete all {currentTest.blocks.Count} blocks?\n\nThis cannot be undone.",
 503                "Delete All", "Cancel"))
 504            {
 505                return;
 506            }
 507
 508            Undo.RecordObject(currentTest, "Clear all blocks");
 509            currentTest.blocks.Clear();
 510            EditorUtility.SetDirty(currentTest);
 511
 512            editingBlockIndex = -1;
 513            blockHasUnsavedChanges = false;
 514            selectedBlockIndex = -1;
 515
 516            RefreshBlockList();
 517            statusLabel.text = "All blocks cleared";
 518        }
 519
 520        private void AddSeparator(VisualElement parent)
 521        {
 522            var sep = new VisualElement();
 523            sep.style.width = 1;
 524            sep.style.height = 14;
 525            sep.style.marginLeft = 4;
 526            sep.style.marginRight = 4;
 527            sep.style.marginTop = 2;
 528            sep.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.4f, 0.4f, 0.4f);
 529            parent.Add(sep);
 530        }
 531
 532        private void AddBlockTypeButton(VisualElement parent, string label, BlockType type, Color color, string tooltip 
 533        {
 534            var btn = new Button(() => AddBlock(type)) { text = label };
 535            btn.style.backgroundColor = color;
 536            btn.style.color = Color.white;
 537            btn.style.height = 18;
 538            btn.style.fontSize = 10;
 539            btn.style.marginRight = 2;
 540            btn.style.paddingLeft = 4;
 541            btn.style.paddingRight = 4;
 542            btn.style.borderTopLeftRadius = 3;
 543            btn.style.borderTopRightRadius = 3;
 544            btn.style.borderBottomLeftRadius = 3;
 545            btn.style.borderBottomRightRadius = 3;
 546            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(tooltip))
 547                btn.tooltip = tooltip;
 548            parent.Add(btn);
 549        }
 550
 551        private void BuildStatusBar()
 552        {
 553            // AI Status Panel (hidden by default)
 554            aiStatusPanel = new VisualElement();
 555            aiStatusPanel.style.flexDirection = FlexDirection.Column;
 556            aiStatusPanel.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.2f, 0.15f, 0.3f);
 557            aiStatusPanel.style.paddingLeft = 6;
 558            aiStatusPanel.style.paddingRight = 6;
 559            aiStatusPanel.style.paddingTop = 4;
 560            aiStatusPanel.style.paddingBottom = 4;
 561            aiStatusPanel.style.borderTopWidth = 1;
 562            aiStatusPanel.style.borderTopColor = new Color(0.5f, 0.3f, 0.7f);
 563            aiStatusPanel.style.display = DisplayStyle.None;
 564
 565            // Header row with state and stop button
 566            var headerRow = new VisualElement();
 567            headerRow.style.flexDirection = FlexDirection.Row;
 568            headerRow.style.alignItems = Align.Center;
 569
 570            var aiIcon = new Label("🤖");
 571            aiIcon.style.fontSize = 12;
 572            aiIcon.style.marginRight = 4;
 573            headerRow.Add(aiIcon);
 574
 575            aiStateLabel = new Label("AI: Idle");
 576            aiStateLabel.style.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.7f, 1f);
 577            aiStateLabel.style.fontSize = 11;
 578            aiStateLabel.style.unityFontStyleAndWeight = FontStyle.Bold;
 579            aiStateLabel.style.flexGrow = 1;
 580            headerRow.Add(aiStateLabel);
 581
 582            aiStopButton = new Button(StopAI) { text = "■ Stop" };
 583            aiStopButton.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.6f, 0.2f, 0.2f);
 584            aiStopButton.style.color = Color.white;
 585            aiStopButton.style.height = 18;
 586            aiStopButton.style.fontSize = 10;
 587            aiStopButton.style.paddingLeft = 6;
 588            aiStopButton.style.paddingRight = 6;
 589            aiStopButton.style.borderTopLeftRadius = 3;
 590            aiStopButton.style.borderTopRightRadius = 3;
 591            aiStopButton.style.borderBottomLeftRadius = 3;
 592            aiStopButton.style.borderBottomRightRadius = 3;
 593            headerRow.Add(aiStopButton);
 594
 595            aiStatusPanel.Add(headerRow);
 596
 597            // Progress bar
 598            aiProgressBar = new ProgressBar();
 599            aiProgressBar.style.height = 4;
 600            aiProgressBar.style.marginTop = 4;
 601            aiProgressBar.style.marginBottom = 2;
 602            aiStatusPanel.Add(aiProgressBar);
 603
 604            // Reasoning label
 605            aiReasoningLabel = new Label("");
 606            aiReasoningLabel.style.color = new Color(0.7f, 0.7f, 0.8f);
 607            aiReasoningLabel.style.fontSize = 9;
 608            aiReasoningLabel.style.whiteSpace = WhiteSpace.Normal;
 609            aiReasoningLabel.style.maxHeight = 32;
 610            aiReasoningLabel.style.overflow = Overflow.Hidden;
 611            aiStatusPanel.Add(aiReasoningLabel);
 612
 613            root.Add(aiStatusPanel);
 614
 615            // Regular status bar
 616            var bar = new VisualElement();
 617            bar.style.flexDirection = FlexDirection.Row;
 618            bar.style.paddingLeft = 4;
 619            bar.style.paddingTop = 2;
 620            bar.style.paddingBottom = 2;
 621            bar.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.12f, 0.12f, 0.12f);
 622
 623            statusLabel = new Label("Select a scene");
 624            statusLabel.style.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f);
 625            statusLabel.style.fontSize = 10;
 626            bar.Add(statusLabel);
 627
 628            root.Add(bar);
 629        }
 630
 631        private void UpdateAIStatusPanel(bool show, string state = null, string reasoning = null, float progress = -1)
 632        {
 633            if (aiStatusPanel == null) return;
 634
 635            aiStatusPanel.style.display = show ? DisplayStyle.Flex : DisplayStyle.None;
 636
 637            if (show)
 638            {
 639                if (state != null)
 640                {
 641                    aiStateLabel.text = $"AI: {state}";
 642
 643                    // Color based on state
 644                    aiStateLabel.style.color = state switch
 645                    {
 646                        "Running" or "Analyzing..." => new Color(0.5f, 1f, 0.5f),
 647                        "Executing action..." => new Color(1f, 0.9f, 0.4f),
 648                        "Completed" => new Color(0.4f, 1f, 0.4f),
 649                        "Failed" or "Error" => new Color(1f, 0.4f, 0.4f),
 650                        "Stopping..." => new Color(1f, 0.6f, 0.3f),
 651                        _ => new Color(0.8f, 0.7f, 1f)
 652                    };
 653                }
 654
 655                if (reasoning != null)
 656                {
 657                    // Truncate long reasoning
 658                    var truncated = reasoning.Length > 120 ? reasoning.Substring(0, 117) + "..." : reasoning;
 659                    aiReasoningLabel.text = truncated;
 660                }
 661
 662                if (progress >= 0)
 663                {
 664                    aiProgressBar.value = progress;
 665                    aiProgressBar.title = $"{(int)(progress * 100)}%";
 666                }
 667            }
 668        }
 669
 670        // === UI State Management ===
 671
 672        private void RefreshUI()
 673        {
 674            // Guard against being called before CreateGUI
 675            if (root == null || statusLabel == null) return;
 676
 677            var hasScene = currentTest != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentTest.startScene);
 678            var hasBlocks = currentTest != null && currentTest.blocks != null && currentTest.blocks.Count > 0;
 679            var inPlayMode = EditorApplication.isPlaying;
 680
 681            // Play button: enabled when we have a scene and blocks
 682            playTestBtn?.SetEnabled(hasScene && hasBlocks);
 683
 684            // Start button: enabled when we have a scene and NOT in play mode
 685            startEditBtn?.SetEnabled(hasScene && !inPlayMode);
 686
 687            // Stop button: enabled when in play mode
 688            stopBtn?.SetEnabled(inPlayMode);
 689
 690            // Block controls: enabled when in play mode
 691            if (blockControls != null)
 692            {
 693                blockControls.SetEnabled(inPlayMode);
 694                blockControls.style.opacity = inPlayMode ? 1f : 0.5f;
 695            }
 696            if (blockControlsRow2 != null)
 697            {
 698                blockControlsRow2.SetEnabled(inPlayMode);
 699                blockControlsRow2.style.opacity = inPlayMode ? 1f : 0.5f;
 700            }
 701
 702            // Update status
 703            if (!hasScene)
 704                statusLabel.text = "Select a scene to begin";
 705            else if (!inPlayMode)
 706                statusLabel.text = "Click 'Edit' to enter play mode";
 707            else
 708                statusLabel.text = "Add blocks and configure them";
 709
 710            RefreshBlockList();
 711        }
 712
 713        // === Block List ===
 714
 715        private void RefreshBlockList()
 716        {
 717            if (blockListContainer == null) return;
 718            blockListContainer.Clear();
 719
 720            if (currentTest == null || currentTest.blocks == null || currentTest.blocks.Count == 0)
 721            {
 722                var empty = new Label("No blocks - add using buttons above");
 723                empty.style.color = new Color(0.4f, 0.4f, 0.4f);
 724                empty.style.paddingTop = 8;
 725                empty.style.paddingLeft = 4;
 726                blockListContainer.Add(empty);
 727                return;
 728            }
 729
 730            // Calculate indent levels for ForEach/EndForEach nesting
 731            int indentLevel = 0;
 732            for (int i = 0; i < currentTest.blocks.Count; i++)
 733            {
 734                var block = currentTest.blocks[i];
 735                // EndForEach decreases indent before rendering
 736                if (block.type == BlockType.EndForEach && indentLevel > 0)
 737                    indentLevel--;
 738
 739                blockListContainer.Add(CreateBlockRow(block, i, indentLevel));
 740
 741                // ForEach increases indent after rendering
 742                if (block.type == BlockType.ForEach)
 743                    indentLevel++;
 744            }
 745        }
 746
 747        private VisualElement CreateBlockRow(VisualBlock block, int index, int indentLevel = 0)
 748        {
 749            var isEditing = (index == editingBlockIndex);
 750            var c = block.GetBlockColor();
 751
 752            // Container for the entire row including indent
 753            var container = new VisualElement();
 754            container.style.flexDirection = FlexDirection.Row;
 755
 756            // Indentation visual (loop bracket)
 757            if (indentLevel > 0)
 758            {
 759                var indent = new VisualElement();
 760                indent.style.width = 12 * indentLevel;
 761                indent.style.borderLeftWidth = 2;
 762                indent.style.borderLeftColor = new Color(0.88f, 0.63f, 0f, 0.6f); // Gold color for loop
 763                indent.style.marginLeft = 4;
 764                container.Add(indent);
 765            }
 766
 767            var row = new VisualElement();
 768            row.style.flexDirection = FlexDirection.Row;
 769            row.style.alignItems = Align.Center;
 770            row.style.height = 20;
 771            row.style.marginBottom = 1;
 772            row.style.paddingLeft = 2;
 773            row.style.paddingRight = 2;
 774            row.style.flexGrow = 1;
 775            row.style.backgroundColor = isEditing ? new Color(c.r * 0.4f, c.g * 0.4f, c.b * 0.4f, 1f) : new Color(0.22f,
 776            row.style.borderLeftWidth = 3;
 777            row.style.borderLeftColor = c;
 778
 779            // Index
 780            row.Add(new Label($"{index + 1}") { style = { width = 14, fontSize = 9, color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f) 
 781
 782            // Type label (short)
 783            var typeNames = new Dictionary<BlockType, string> {
 784                { BlockType.Click, "CLK" }, { BlockType.DoubleClick, "DBL" }, { BlockType.Hold, "HLD" },
 785                { BlockType.Type, "TYP" }, { BlockType.KeyPress, "KEY" }, { BlockType.KeyHold, "KyH" },
 786                { BlockType.SetSlider, "SLD" }, { BlockType.SetScrollbar, "SBR" },
 787                { BlockType.Drag, "DRG" }, { BlockType.Scroll, "SCR" }, { BlockType.ScrollUntil, "S4" },
 788                { BlockType.Wait, "W" }, { BlockType.WaitForElement, "W4" },
 789                { BlockType.Assert, "AST" }, { BlockType.Log, "LOG" },
 790                { BlockType.Screenshot, "SS" }, { BlockType.LoadScene, "SCN" },
 791                { BlockType.Swipe, "SWP" }, { BlockType.Pinch, "PCH" },
 792                { BlockType.TwoFingerSwipe, "2SW" }, { BlockType.Rotate, "ROT" },
 793                { BlockType.ForEach, "FOR" }, { BlockType.EndForEach, "END" }
 794            };
 795            var typeLbl = new Label(typeNames.GetValueOrDefault(block.type, "?"));
 796            typeLbl.style.width = 26;
 797            typeLbl.style.fontSize = 9;
 798            typeLbl.style.color = c;
 799            typeLbl.style.unityFontStyleAndWeight = FontStyle.Bold;
 800            row.Add(typeLbl);
 801
 802            // Content based on type - all inline, all editable when in edit mode
 803            BuildRowContent(row, block, index, isEditing);
 804
 805            // Spacer
 806            row.Add(new VisualElement { style = { flexGrow = 1 } });
 807
 808            // Unsaved marker
 809            if (isEditing && blockHasUnsavedChanges)
 810                row.Add(new Label("*") { style = { color = Color.yellow, marginRight = 2 } });
 811
 812            // Action buttons
 813            if (isEditing)
 814            {
 815                var saveBtn = new Button(() => SaveBlock(index)) { text = "✓" };
 816                saveBtn.style.width = 20; saveBtn.style.height = 16; saveBtn.style.fontSize = 10;
 817                saveBtn.style.backgroundColor = new Color(0.3f, 0.5f, 0.3f);
 818                saveBtn.SetEnabled(blockHasUnsavedChanges);
 819                row.Add(saveBtn);
 820            }
 821            else
 822            {
 823                var editBtn = new Button(() => StartEditingBlock(index)) { text = "✎" };
 824                editBtn.style.width = 20; editBtn.style.height = 16; editBtn.style.fontSize = 10;
 825                editBtn.SetEnabled(EditorApplication.isPlaying);
 826                row.Add(editBtn);
 827            }
 828
 829            var runBtn = new Button(() => RunToBlock(index)) { text = "▶" };
 830            runBtn.style.width = 18; runBtn.style.height = 16; runBtn.style.fontSize = 9;
 831            runBtn.SetEnabled(EditorApplication.isPlaying && (!isEditing || !blockHasUnsavedChanges));
 832            row.Add(runBtn);
 833
 834            var delBtn = new Button(() => DeleteBlock(index)) { text = "×" };
 835            delBtn.style.width = 18; delBtn.style.height = 16; delBtn.style.fontSize = 11;
 836            delBtn.style.color = new Color(1f, 0.4f, 0.4f);
 837            row.Add(delBtn);
 838
 839            container.Add(row);
 840            return container;
 841        }
 842
 843        private void BuildRowContent(VisualElement row, VisualBlock block, int index, bool isEditing)
 844        {
 845            // Allow target button editing when isEditing (even outside play mode for AI-created blocks)
 846            // But visual picking requires play mode
 847            var canEditTarget = isEditing;
 848            var canVisualPick = EditorApplication.isPlaying && isEditing;
 849
 850            switch (block.type)
 851            {
 852                case BlockType.Click:
 853                    AddTargetButton(row, block, index, canEditTarget, 200, isEditing);
 854                    break;
 855
 856                case BlockType.Type:
 857                    AddTargetButton(row, block, index, canEditTarget, 120, isEditing);
 858                    var txt = new TextField { value = block.text ?? "" };
 859                    txt.style.width = 80; txt.style.height = 16; txt.style.fontSize = 10;
 860                    txt.SetEnabled(isEditing);

 871                        row.Add(ent);
